title: Anyone know if this scene was ever happened
display_title: Anyone know if this scene was ever happened
wikitext:
[]: Anyone know if this scene was ever happened? Post by terminus » Sat May 31, 2008 9:34 pm I was looking at this Evangelion resin kit: http://www.hlj.com/product/MUSE16 and it said "This impressive scene, taken from the climax of Evangelion", but I don't remember this scene in Evangelion, so does anyone know if there really was a scene like in this kit?

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat May 31, 2008 9:38 pm Of course not. The only time Unit-01 ever came in contact with the Lance of Longinus was in EoE.

[]: Post by slothen » Sat May 31, 2008 9:39 pm never happened

[]: Post by terminus » Sat May 31, 2008 9:40 pm k thanks...I though it would probably very funny if Eva-01 actually "did" sit like that.

[]: Post by mrpanda » Sun Jun 01, 2008 4:06 pm LILITH GOT TEABAGED !!!!! tHIS SO NEEDS TO GO IN THE CAPTION CONTEST !

[]: Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Jun 01, 2008 9:29 pm Yeah, that scene definitely didn't happen. Damn figure makers trying to lie to you. I personally don't think this thread serves anymore purpose since the question presented has been answered. Your call terminus.
